verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I walk through the doors I felt His presence And I knew this was the place where love abounds For we are His temple Jehovah God abides in Oh we are standing in His presence on holy ground

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are standing on holy ground, And I know that there are angels all around. Let us praise Jesus now, We are standing in His presence on holy ground.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In His presence there is joy beyond all measure And at His feet sweet peace of mind can still be found For when we have a need He is still the answer Reach out and claim it for we are standing on holy ground
